introSection: Walrus Splash is a steel water roller coaster located at Chimelong Ocean Kingdom in Xiangzhou, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China. It is one of the two water coasters at the park, with the other being Polar Explorer.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 4 rows for a total of 16 riders per car.

fullText:
Walrus Splash is a steel water roller coaster located at Chimelong Ocean Kingdom in Xiangzhou, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China. It is one of the two water coasters at the park, with the other being Polar Explorer.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 4 rows for a total of 16 riders per car.
